_comment_template: Replace with a real signed payload. The signature is over the EIP-712 author attestation built via @origintrail-official/dkg-core's buildAuthorAttestationTypedData. See `experiments/agent-provenance-devnet/README.md` mode (b) for context.

authorAttestation._comment: Phase 4 — adapter-side EIP-712 signing — is not implemented in PR #436. This payload field is forward-looking; until Phase 4 lands, the on-chain `author` for Hermes/OpenClaw publishes is the daemon publisher EOA, not the agent EOA. See README §Out-of-scope.
